name: Javelin of Lightning
description: Each time you make an attack roll with this magic weapon and hit, you can have it deal Lightning damage instead of Piercing damage.

properties.damage_type_swap: Can deal Lightning damage instead of Piercing on hit

lightning_bolt.activation: Throw weapon at target no farther than 120 feet
lightning_bolt.effect: Weapon becomes bolt of lightning forming 5-foot-wide Line between you and target
lightning_bolt.targets: Target and each other creature in line (excluding you)
lightning_bolt.return: Weapon reappears in hand immediately after dealing damage
lightning_bolt.reuse_duration: Can't be used again until next dawn
